title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
